name: Banana Bread (No Milk or Wheat)
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Sifted amaranth flour or - sifted brown rice flour
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 loaf.
1. Process the 1/4 cup nuts in a blender until finely ground.
2. Mix the nuts with the flour, arrowroot and baking soda in a large bowl. Stir in the chopped nuts.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the bananas, oil, honey, eggs, lemon juice and vanilla.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the flour bowl and mix with a few swift strokes. Do not overmix.
5. Pour into a greased 9x5 inches loaf pan or 2 7x3 inches pans.
6. Bake large loaf at 350°F for 55 to 60 minutes, or small loaves for 45 minutes until a cake tester inserted in the middle comes out clean. Let stand in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn the loaf out onto a wire rack to cool.
